vectors.description: valid 3-receipt chain (manifest then action then closed)
valid 3-receipt chain (independent workflow)
valid 3-receipt chain (third independent workflow)
valid single-receipt manifest-only chain
valid 4-receipt chain (manifest then 2 actions)
tampered signature on manifest - L1 FAIL
sequence gap between seq 0 and seq 2 - INCOMPLETE_CHAIN
prev_receipt_hash mismatch on action - HASH_MISMATCH
manifest with non-null prev_receipt_hash - NULL_HASH_EXPECTED
two consecutive manifests - second manifest has wrong structure
correct sequence numbers but wrong prev_hash - HASH_MISMATCH
duplicate sequence number 0 - INCOMPLETE_CHAIN
valid chain + allowlisted TSA token - L3 PASS
valid chain + non-allowlisted TSA token - L3 FAIL
chain starts with action_receipt (not workflow_manifest) - MISSING_MANIFEST
DER parsing supply-chain check - verifies @peculiar/asn1-* returns correct messageImprint bytes
C1: TSA token uses MD5 OID instead of SHA-256 - L3 FAIL (tsa_hash_algorithm_not_sha256)
C2: TSA token genTime is before receipt issued_at - L3 FAIL (tsa_gentime_before_issued_at)
C3: receipt has spec_version='var/99.0' (unknown) - L2 FAIL (UNKNOWN_SPEC_VERSION)
D1: action_receipt with billable_reason=DEGRADED_SESSION - chain valid, DEGRADED_STATE warning emitted
D2: post_receipt linked to action_receipt without money_action=true - chain valid, MONEY_ACTION_TAG_MISSING warning emitted
